text: Bade bhai hone ke naate maine batwara mein apna hissa chote ke liye chhod diya taaki wo shehar jaake settle ho sake, par ab mujhe hi double shifts karke ghar ki EMI bharani pad rahi hai. Main shehar mein akela reh kar physically exhaust ho chuka hoon, par main rukne ka risk nahi le sakta kyunki poore parivaar ki 'izzat' mere hi kandhon par hai. Mera thakna ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakta.

Ghar walon ne saari jaydad bhai ke naam kar di taaki uska future secure rahe, aur mujhse umeed ki jati hai ki main apni 'hidden identity' ko daba kar unki umeedon par khara utaru. Main exhaustion ki hadd paar kar chuka hoon, par mujhe bina kisi break ke kaam karte rehna hai taaki bhai ki shadi aur parivaar ka bojh sambhal sakun. Main afford nahi kar sakti ki main gir jaun, yahi mera bade hone ka farz hai.

Bhai ko property ka bada share milne par 'log kya kahenge' ki chinta mein maine koi sawal nahi uthaya aur ab apni salary se sab manage kar raha hoon. Main burnout ki kagar par hoon par rukne ka option nahi hai kyunki chote bhai-behen ki padhai mere hi bharose hai. Bade hone ki yahi keemat hai ki aap thak kar bhi structural endurance dikhate raho aur parivaar ko tootne se bachao.

Family fear ki wajah se main hamesha 'cannot afford to stop' wali state mein rehta hoon, kyunki agar main ruka toh sabko meri asliyat pata chal jayegi. Bhai ko property milne ke baad ab saari financial obligations mujh par aa gayi hain aur main physically toot chuka hoon. Mujhe bas chalte rehna hai taaki ghar ki stability bani rahe, bhale hi andar se main kitni bhi kurban ho jaun.

Joint family mein property batwara mein mere saath na-insafi hui par bade hone ke naate mujhe ye duty nibhani hai aur mehnat karte rehna hai. Main itna thak gaya hoon ki dimaag sunn ho gaya hai, par chote bhai ki coaching fees aur ghar ke kharche ke liye mujhe rukna manzoor nahi. Mera kaam sirf endurance dikhana hai taaki bhai ka rasta saaf rahe aur khandaan ka naam na doobe.
